description: This is a false-colour infrared satellite image from SPOT-5, acquired on 2011-09-08, with a 2.5 m resolution and 1/2/3 Band Combination, depicting a mountainous landscape within the Tendeñera Natura 2000 site in the Spanish Pyrenees. The image shows rugged terrain dominated by exposed rock and sparsely vegetated areas rendered in reddish-brown tones. Denser vegetation appears in darker red, indicating its infrared reflectance. A dark blue/black body of water is visible in the upper part of the image. A small, bright green dot is centrally located on a lighter, flatter section of the terrain, highlighting the specified "Siliceous Pyrenean Festuca eskia grassland example."
